Describe the sequence of interactions involving the person's hand and the dessert items throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a hand reaches towards a yellow mound in a cup; at 2s, an arm extends towards background items behind ice cream cones; at 16s, a hand touches the tip of a pink and white striped cone; at 18s, the hand touches the tip of a party hat balanced on a box.

question: Describe how the arrangement of cones and boxes changes from the beginning to the end of the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, three ice cream cones with sprinkles sit on a pink tablecloth; at 12s, only two cones remain visible during rapid camera movement; at 16s, a red box labeled Joy Sugar Cones stands on the left; at 18s, a pink striped party hat balances on a purple box near the wall.
